# Code of Conduct 🚦

**Pledge**: We maintain a harassment-free, inclusive community for everyone.

**Standards**: Be kind, respectful, and avoid hate or discrimination. Give and gracefully accept constructive feedback. 

**Enforcement**: Report issues to **gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com**. We will investigate promptly and take appropriate action.

**Attribution**: Based on the Contributor Covenant v2.1.
